hooks.command: echo Chamber-19 discipline reminder: before editing this file, read whichever of these org skills apply -- ..\.github\docs\skills\CSS_DISCIPLINE.md (any .css/.scss), ..\.github\docs\skills\UI_UX_DISCIPLINE.md (any .jsx/.tsx/.css/.scss), ..\.github\docs\skills\RUST.MD (any .rs), ..\.github\docs\skills\TAURI.MD (anything under src-tauri/), ..\.github\docs\skills\MARKDOWN.md (any .md/.mdx). Apply their MUST/NEVER rules to your edit. Source-of-truth is chamber-19/.github @ main.
